sentences: Vision transformer (<ENT_038>) <REF_005>, inherited from <ENT_007>, performs well on the image recognition task.
<ENT_038>-FRCNN <REF_106> uses a pre-trained backbone (<ENT_038>) for a <ENT_015>-based detector.
It utilizes convolution neural networks and relies on strong 2D inductive biases and regionwise pooling operations for object-level perception.
Other similar works, such as <ENT_008> <REF_007>, introduce 2D inductive bias using CNNs and pyramidal features.

<ENT_027> <REF_018> presents the transferability and versatility of the transformer from image recognition to detection in the sequence aspect using the least information about the spatial design of the input.
It closely follows the <ENT_038> architecture with two simple modifications.
Firstly, it removes the image-classification patches (CLS) and adds randomly initialized one hundred detection patches (DET) as <REF_107> along with the input patch embeddings for object detection.
Secondly, similar to <ENT_008>, a bipartite matching loss is used instead of the <ENT_038> classification loss.
